falsification_conditions.condition: SPX closes below 4200 on any single day in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The bottom_2024_aug pattern match is invalidated because that bottom held above 4200; a break below would signal a lower low formation inconsistent with the pattern, proving this is not a comparable bottoming structure

falsification_conditions.condition: VIX closes above 35 for 2 consecutive days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: The blowoff score of 39 suggests controlled fear; sustained VIX above 35 indicates panic escalation rather than blowoff capitulation, invalidating the 'bottom' interpretation and suggesting deeper liquidation ahead

falsification_conditions.condition: 10Y Treasury yield drops below 3.80% while SPX is simultaneously below 4400
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This would signal a flight-to-safety recession scare rather than a growth-bottoming dynamic; the 2024 August bottom saw yields stable/rising with equities stabilizing, so this divergence proves the macro regime is different

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
